title: MXID Login managed configuration
description: Pushed by enterprise policy (same MDM/GPO that force-installs the extension). Lets IT set the MXID URL once for the whole fleet — no per-user setup.

mxidBaseUrl.title: MXID base URL
mxidBaseUrl.description: The MXID portal origin, e.g. https://mxid.corp. The extension calls its /api/v1/portal/... endpoints here.
